arts.ttl: I helped discover Trent Alexander-Arnold for Liverpool - but want him to lose this weekend
arts.sum: Accrington Stanley manager John Doolan is hoping to catch up with Trent Alexander-Arnold and his mother when the League Two side face Liverpool in the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Strange goings on at Liverpool sum up how quickly football can change
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (James Noble, Andrew Cullen, Matt C Jones)
arts.sum: Our Liverpool fan jury have their say on a difficult few days for the Reds after a draw in the Premier League and loss in the League Cup

arts.ttl: Liverpool could make 10 changes for FA Cup tie against Accrington Stanley
arts.sum: Liverpool are next up against Accrington Stanley in the FA Cup with Arne Slot facing some selection posers

arts.ttl: Liverpool's FA Cup preparations disrupted by snowy weather
arts.sum: Liverpool preparations for Saturday's FA Cup third round tie against Accrington Stanley have been disrupted as a result of the wintery weather affecting north west England. The plan was that the players and staff would arrive home that night, rather than staying over in the capital or going by road and being dropped off in the early hours of Thursday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool star Harvey Elliott is wanted by two clubs after making comeback from foot injury - as Reds weigh up move for Napoli's Khvicha Kvaratskhelia
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Despite a recent defeat to Tottenham in the Carabao Cup, the Reds are enjoying a fantastic campaign under Arne Slot thus far - though Elliott has played a bit part role for the Reds.

arts.ttl: Man United, Liverpool to rival PSG for Napoli's Khvicha Kvaratskhelia?
arts.sum: Manchester United and Liverpool could reportedly rival French giants Paris Saint-Germain for the signature of Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia.

arts.ttl: Tottenham hero Lucas Bergvall rubs salt into Liverpool wounds - 'It couldn't be better!'
arts.sum: Tottenham beat Liverpool 1-0 in their first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final clash and it was Lucas Bergvall's first goal for Spurs which separated the two teams

arts.ttl: “Go and sign him now” – Tottenham urged to secure the signing Liverpool fan favourite
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been advised to consider an immediate move for Liverpool goalkeeper Caoimhin Kelleher to address their ongoing goalkeeping issues. With Guglielmo Vicario sidelined since November due to ankle surgery, Spurs have relied on veteran Fraser Forster, whose contract expires at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Man Utd and Liverpool EYE Kvaratskhelia, Arsenal's Isak MOVE, Chelsea Osimhen LATEST: FT Recap
arts.sum: Man Utd and Liverpool EYE Kvaratskhelia, Arsenal's Isak MOVE, Chelsea Osimhen LATEST: FT Recap With the January transfer window well and truly in full swing, major teams have looked to conduct some huge deals as the rumour mill continues to swirl with some blockbuster moves.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool plotting incredible swap deal to land Khvicha Kvaratskhelia
arts.sum: Liverpool’s interest in Napoli’s Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has intensified, with reports suggesting the Reds are exploring an ambitious swap deal to secure the Georgian winger. Earlier, The Athletic’s David Ornstein revealed that while Liverpool are not actively pursuing Kvaratskhelia, they might make a move should he become available.
